# SBDC Training Overview

> BOSS Libraries public routing record. Use it to find the right source, link, organization, or person.

## Description

The training page organizes SBDC education into low-cost in-person events, free live and recorded webinars, Spanish webinars, and a Become a Trainer path. Use for users who need structured learning alongside advising.

## When to surface

Surface when the user's question concerns mentoring and advising, training and this source is relevant to the next document or human handoff.

## Key information

- ## Resource summary
- The training page organizes SBDC education into low-cost in-person events, free live and recorded webinars, Spanish webinars, and a Become a Trainer path. Use for users who need structured learning alongside advising.
- ## BOSS routing use
- Use this when the entrepreneur wants education, classes, webinars, or event-based learning. If the issue is urgent or specific to the business, pair training with SBDC advising.
- ## Dynamic-content warning
- Class dates and webinar titles change. Provide the official link and instruct the user to filter by location/topic/format rather than relying on stale dates.

## People and links

- Organizations: Small Business Development Center (SBDC)
- Link: <https://www.sbdc.uh.edu/sbdc/Training.asp>

## Next handoff

Open the cited source link when available and route follow-up to Small Business Development Center (SBDC) or the named qualified resource.

## Guardrails

- The BOSS Libraries Librarian retrieves and routes information; it is not a mentor or a substitute for a qualified professional.
- Verify live pages for current eligibility, deadlines, contacts, prices, and program rules before presenting them as current.
